dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6523 IH: To direct the United States Postal Service to establish a post office in Mountain House, California.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Harder of California introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To direct the United States Postal Service to establish a post office in Mountain House, California.

section.header: Establish post office in Mountain House, California
section.text: The United States Postal Service shall establish a post office in Mountain House, California, not later than one year after the date of the enactment of this Act.
